description: Log in to the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web console (username: 'admin', password: 'Admin@2024') to configure a PCI-DSS Compliance Report. The report must enable Requirement 7 (Restrict access to cardholder data by business need-to-know), Requirement 8 (Identify and authenticate access to system components), and Requirement 10 (Track and monitor all access to network resources and cardholder data). Schedule this report as 'PCI Compliance Weekly' to run weekly every Monday at 08:00 AM in PDF format, emailed to 'compliance-team@acmecorp.com' with the subject 'Weekly PCI-DSS Compliance Report'. Document the configured email address and the selected Requirement numbers in a text file at 'C:\workspace\tasks\pci_compliance_config.txt'.
